scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others -p "[{name}]" -n "PWA,DASH,READ,WRITE,CLIENT,WORK" -c "cyan,magenta,yellow,green,blue,red" "npm run dev -w @flux/staff-pwa" "npm run dev -w @flux/dashboard" "npm run dev -w @flux/api-read" "npm run dev -w @flux/api-write" "npm run dev -w @flux/client" "npm run dev -w @flux/ticket-worker"
